news.t: Long-short ETFs offer investors a 'smarter way to hedge,' fund manager says as demand rises

holdings.infoBox: DWSH is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash stock at 112.93%, Invesco Short-Term Investments Trust Government & Agency Portfolio Institutional Class at 85.96%, Fiserv at -0.74%, Guidewire Software at -0.75%, and EPAM Systems at -0.75%.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Dorsey Wright Short ETF (DWSH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to achieve long-term capital appreciation by shorting US-listed large-cap companies exhibiting weak relative strength. DWSH was launched on Jul 10, 2018 and is issued by AdvisorShares.

data.title: Long-short ETFs offer investors a 'smarter way to hedge,' fund manager says as demand rises
data.text: Exchange-traded funds that leverage short-selling strategies can help investors diversify their portfolios and hedge against unexpected declines, says Noah Hamman, CEO and founder of AdvisorShares.

data.title: Long-short ETFs see rising interest — AdvisorShares CEO breaks down the strategy
data.text: Noah Hamman, CEO and founder of AdvisorShares, explains how his firm's long-short exchange-traded funds can help investors diversify their portfolios and hedge against unexpected declines. With CNBC's...
